mapper.select: SELECT id, code, partner_code, status, total_amount, currency, requested_delivery_date, version, placed_at, shipped_at FROM sales_order WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT count(*) FROM sales_order WHERE code = #{code}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sales_order (id, code, partner_code, status, total_amount, currency, requested_delivery_date, version, placed_at, shipped_at) VALUES (#{row.id}, #{row.code}, #{row.partnerCode}, #{row.status}, #{row.totalAmount}, #{row.currency}, #{row.requestedDeliveryDate}, #{row.version}, #{row.placedAt}, #{row.shippedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE sales_order SET code = #{row.code}, partner_code = #{row.partnerCode}, status = #{row.status}, total_amount = #{row.totalAmount}, currency = #{row.currency}, requested_delivery_date = #{row.requestedDeliveryDate}, version = #{row.version}, shipped_at = #{row.shippedAt}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{row.id} AND version = #{expectedVersion}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sales_order WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{expectedVersion}
mapper.select: SELECT order_id, line_no, sku_code, location_id, quantity, unit_price FROM sales_order_item WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY line_no
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sales_order_item (order_id, line_no, sku_code, location_id, quantity, unit_price) VALUES (#{row.orderId}, #{row.lineNo}, #{row.skuCode}, #{row.locationId}, #{row.quantity}, #{row.unitPrice})
